---
title: "FIRST_5_STEPS"
author: '520004915'
date: "2024-04-11"
output: html_document
---
```{r, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(GEOquery)
library(limma)
library(caret)
library(stringr)
library(reshape)
rm(list=ls())

gse1 ='GSE36059'
gse2 ='GSE129166'

eSet1 <- getGEO('GSE36059')
eSet1<- eSet1$GSE36059_series_matrix.txt.gz
eSet2 <- getGEO('GSE129166')
eSet2<- eSet2$GSE129166_series_matrix.txt.gz

exp1 <- exprs(eSet1)
phe1 <- pData(phenoData(eSet1))
feature1<-fData(eSet1)

exp2 <- exprs(eSet2)
phe2 <- pData(phenoData(eSet2))
feature2<-fData(eSet2)

eSet1 <- getGEO('GSE36059', GSEMatrix = TRUE)
if (length(eSet1) > 0) {
    eSet1 <- eSet1[[1]]
}

```

```{r}
#clean features
f1 <-feature1 %>% filter(`Gene Symbol` != '', !is.na(`Gene Symbol`))
f1$'Gene Symbol' <- sapply(strsplit(f1$'Gene Symbol', ' /// '), function(x) x[1])
f1$'Gene Symbol' <- make.unique(f1$'Gene Symbol', sep = '_')

f2 <-feature2 %>% filter(`Gene Symbol` != '', !is.na(`Gene Symbol`))
f2$'Gene Symbol' <- sapply(strsplit(f2$'Gene Symbol', ' /// '), function(x) x[1])
f2$'Gene Symbol' <- make.unique(f2$'Gene Symbol', sep = '_')

## Rename probe IDs in expression matrix to gene symbols
exp1 <- as.data.frame(exp1)
# Probe ID in column 1, gene symbol in column 11
gene_symbols1 <- f1[, c(1, 11)]
exp1[, 'ID'] <- rownames(exp1)
exp1 <- merge(x = exp1, y = gene_symbols1, by.x = 'ID')
f1 <- f1 %>% filter(`ID` %in% exp1$`ID`)
exp1[, 'Gene Symbol'] <- make.unique(exp1[, 'Gene Symbol'], sep = '_')
# Set gene symbols as the rownames of the data frame
rownames(exp1) <- exp1[, 'Gene Symbol']
exp1[, c('ID', 'Gene Symbol')] <- NULL
exp1 <- as.matrix(exp1)

exp2 <- as.data.frame(exp2)
gene_symbols2 <- f2[, c(1, 11)]
exp2[, 'ID'] <- rownames(exp2)
exp2 <- merge(x = exp2, y = gene_symbols2, by.x = 'ID')
f2 <- f2 %>% filter(`ID` %in% exp2$`ID`)
exp2[, 'Gene Symbol'] <- make.unique(exp2[, 'Gene Symbol'], sep = '_')
rownames(exp2) <- exp2[, 'Gene Symbol']
exp2[, c('ID', 'Gene Symbol')] <- NULL
exp2 <- as.matrix(exp2)

#conbime gene expressions
table(rownames(exp1) %in% rownames(exp2))
exp1 <- exp1[intersect(rownames(exp1),rownames(exp2)),]
exp2 <- exp2[intersect(rownames(exp1),rownames(exp2)),]

if(!identical(rownames(phe1),colnames(exp1))) exp1 = exp1[,match(rownames(phe1),colnames(exp1))]
if(!identical(rownames(phe2),colnames(exp2))) exp2 = exp2[,match(rownames(phe2),colnames(exp2))]

exp <- cbind(exp1,exp2)

#remove batch effects
batch_info <- c(rep(1, ncol(exp1)), rep(2, ncol(exp2)))
exprSet_corrected <- removeBatchEffect(exp, batch_info)
##set groups
phe1$outcome <- ifelse(str_detect(phe1$title, 'non-rejecting'), 'non-rejection',
                       ifelse(str_detect(phe1$title, 'ABMR'), 'ABMR',
                              ifelse(str_detect(phe1$title, 'TCMR'), 'TCMR', 'Other')))
phe1 <- phe1%>% filter(outcome != 'Other')#remove other

phe2 <-phe2 %>% mutate(
  ABMR_Status = ifelse(`abmr (no:ch1` == '0_Yes:1): 1', 'ABMR', 'ABMR Stable'),
  TCMR_Status = ifelse(`tcmr (no:ch1` == '0_borderline:1_TCMR:2): 1', 'TCMR', 'TCMR Stable')
  )%>%
    filter(!(ABMR_Status == 'ABMR' & TCMR_Status == 'TCMR')) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = case_when(
      ABMR_Status == 'ABMR Stable' & TCMR_Status == 'TCMR Stable' ~ 'non-rejection',
      ABMR_Status == 'ABMR Stable' ~ 'TCMR',
      TCMR_Status == 'TCMR Stable' ~ 'ABMR',
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )
###remove both TCMR and ABMR, then if the original sting was TCMR Stable, then it appears to be ABMR

## Remove corresponding columns of geo accession data from expression matrix that were dropped in pheno data
exprSet_corrected <- exprSet_corrected[, colnames(exprSet_corrected) %in% c(phe1$geo_accession, phe2$geo_accession)]

group <- table(c(phe1$outcome, phe2$outcome))

#normalisation
combine_symbol <- union(f1$`Gene Symbol`, f2$`Gene Symbol`)
eMat <- exprSet_corrected[rownames(exprSet_corrected) %in% combine_symbol, ]
gene_means <- rowMeans(eMat)
gene_percentile <- rank(gene_means) / length(gene_means)
threshold <- 0.25
filtered_genes <- eMat[gene_percentile > threshold,]
## [normalisation]
exprSet <- normalizeBetweenArrays(filtered_genes)
qx <- as.numeric(quantile(exprSet,c(0.,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.99,1.0),na.rm=T))
logC <- (qx[5]>100) ||
           (qx[6]-qx[1]>50 && qx[2]>0) ||
            (qx[2]>0 && qx[2]<1 && qx[4]>1 && qx[4]<2)
if (logC){
  exprSet [which(exprSet <=0)] <- NaN
  exprSet_clean <- log2(exprSet)
  print('log2 transformation finished')
}else{
  print('does not need log2 transformation')
}
#normalisaton done, see how it looks
boxplot(exp)#after combination
boxplot(exprSet_corrected)#bacth effected
boxplot(exprSet)#normaled
```


#Feature Selection - limma 

```{r}
#feature selection - limma
outcomes <- c(phe1$outcome, phe2$outcome)
outcomes <- gsub("-", "_", outcomes) # Replace hyphens with underscores

phe <- factor(outcomes)
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + phe) #design matrix
colnames(design) <- levels(phe)

# Define contrasts
contrast.matrix <- makeContrasts(
  TCMRvsNon = TCMR - non_rejection,
  ABMRvsNon = ABMR - non_rejection,
  TCMRvsABMR = non_rejection - (1 / 2 * (TCMR - ABMR)),
  levels = design)

# Fit the model
fit <- lmFit(exprSet, design)
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast.matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)
```

```{r}
#  top10, top50 and top100
topResults_10 <- topTable(fit2, n=10 )
topResults_50 <- topTable(fit2, n=50 )
topResults_100 <- topTable(fit2, n=100)
```

```{r}
# Boxplot
genes_10 <- rownames(topResults_10)
genes_50 <- rownames(topResults_50)
genes_100 <- rownames(topResults_100)

# Subset exprSet for top 10, 50, 100
exprSet_10 <- exprSet[rownames(exprSet) %in% genes_10, ]
exprSet_50 <- exprSet[rownames(exprSet) %in% genes_50, ]
exprSet_100 <- exprSet[rownames(exprSet) %in% genes_100, ]

# Melting and categories
melted_10 <- melt(exprSet_10)
melted_10$category <- "Top 10"

melted_50 <- melt(exprSet_50)
melted_50$category <- "Top 50"

melted_100 <- melt(exprSet_100)
melted_100$category <- "Top 100"

# Combine
meltedData <- rbind(melted_10, melted_50, melted_100)
colnames(meltedData) <- c("Sample", "Gene", "Expression", "Category")

ggplot(meltedData, aes(x = Category, y = Expression, fill = Category)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Expression differences for Top 10, 50, 100 Genes",
       x = "Gene Category",
       y = "Expression Level") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```


#do cross-validation on different numbers of features selected to obtain the best number of selected features
```{r}
library(caret)
library(nnet)  # for multinom function
set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility

# Assuming 'exprSet' and 'outcomes' are already defined
data_frame <- data.frame(t(exprSet))
data_frame$outcome <- as.factor(outcomes)  # Ensure outcomes are a factor

# Define training control
train_control <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",  # k-fold cross-validation
  number = 10,  # number of folds
  savePredictions = "final",
  classProbs = TRUE  # for ROC/AUC if needed
)

# List to store models
results <- list()

# Iterate over different numbers of top genes
for (n_top_genes in c(10, 50, 100)) {
  # Subset the top N genes
  genes_subset <- topTable(fit2, n=n_top_genes)$Gene
  subset_exprSet <- data_frame[, genes_subset]

  # Model fitting using multinomial logistic regression
  model_fit <- train(
    x = subset_exprSet, 
    y = data_frame$outcome,
    method = "multinom",  # using multinomial logistic regression
    trControl = train_control,
    metric = "Accuracy"  # or "ROC" if classProbs=TRUE
  )
  
  # Store results
  results[[paste("top", n_top_genes, "genes")]] <- model_fit
}

# Review model performances
lapply(results, function(x) x$results)

```


build svm model
```{r}
library(kernlab)
library(caret)

# Preprocessing data to remove NAs and scale inputs
data_frame <- data.frame(t(exprSet))
data_frame <- na.omit(data_frame)  # Remove rows with NAs
data_frame$outcome <- as.factor(outcomes)  # Ensure outcomes are a factor

# Define training control with added preprocessing steps
train_control <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 10,
  savePredictions = "final",
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
  allowParallel = TRUE
)

# List to store SVM models
svm_results <- list()

# Iterate over different numbers of top genes
for (n_top_genes in c(10, 50, 100)) {
  genes_subset <- topTable(fit2, n=n_top_genes)$Gene
  subset_exprSet <- data_frame[, genes_subset, drop = FALSE]

  # Add pre-processing steps directly in the train function
  svm_fit <- train(
    x = subset_exprSet,
    y = data_frame$outcome,
    method = "svmRadial",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),  # Centering and scaling
    trControl = train_control,
    metric = "Accuracy",
    tuneGrid = expand.grid(sigma = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1), C = c(0.1, 1, 10))
  )
  
  svm_results[[paste("SVM_top", n_top_genes, "genes")]] <- svm_fit
}

# Review SVM model performances
lapply(svm_results, function(x) x$results)

# Optionally, plot performance metrics

```
